query:
INSERT INTO partner_config (configKey, configValue, description) VALUES
('founding_price_paise', '250000', 'Founding Partner annual price in paise (Rs. 2,500)'),
('regular_price_paise', '500000', 'Regular Partner annual price in paise (Rs. 5,000)'),
('tea_discount_percent', '15', 'Percentage discount on all tea items for Partners'),
('referrer_reward_paise', '25000', 'Maami Rupees (paise) credited to referrer when referral subscribes (Rs. 250)'),
('referred_reward_paise', '10000', 'Maami Rupees (paise) credited to new Partner from referral (Rs. 100)'),
('founding_slots_total', '100', 'Total number of Founding Partner slots available'),
('founding_slots_remaining', '100', 'Remaining Founding Partner slots'),
('programme_active', 'true', 'Whether the Partner Programme is accepting new subscriptions'),
('free_food_product_slug', 'biang-biang-noodles', 'Slug of the free food item at T.Nagar (Biang Biang)'),
('free_tea_size', 'large', 'Size of free tea at Palladium outlet'),
('tnagar_outlet_id', '2', 'Outlet ID for T.Nagar'),
('palladium_outlet_id', '1', 'Outlet ID for Palladium')
